payload.title: View popover: collapse epic-filter + group-by + show-done
payload.description:
Replace the epic-filter `<select>`, the group-by `<select>`, and the "Show done" checkbox with a single button:

  [≡ View ▾]

Clicking opens a popover with the three controls stacked:
- Filter by epic: (All tickets / SCP-N · …)
- Group by: (None / Epic / Assignee / Priority / Type)
- Show done epics: checkbox (only shown when Group by = Epic, same conditional as today)

Trigger reflects active state — when non-default, the label shows what's set:
- Default: `View ▾`
- Only group: `Epic ▾`
- Only filter: `SCP-2 ▾`
- Both: `Epic · SCP-2 ▾`
- Or use a small badge with count of active non-default settings.

Notes:
- Replaces 3 bar controls with 1.
- Popover anchors below trigger, closes on outside-click and Escape.
- localStorage keys (`scope.groupBy`, `scope.showDoneEpics`) keep working — the popover reads/writes the same state.

Touches: index.html, app.js (bindViewPopover, replace bindTopbar wiring), style.css (popover styles, can share with breadcrumb popover).
